S:\\Archivist-Agent.description: Primary governance authority - can write anywhere

S:\\SwarmMind Self-Optimizing Multi-Agen.description: Execution agent - writes to own lane only unless cross-lane coordination required

S:\\self-organizing-library.description: Memory and documentation hub - writes to own lane only

S:\\.global.description: Global governance files - owned by governance root

default_ownership.rationale: Governance root owns unspecified territory for safety

cross_lane_write_policy.description: Cross-lane writes require either authority >= 100 OR target owned by same lane
